title: stenandriopsis grandiflora
intro: Stenandriopsis grandiflora is a tropical plant species, also known as the "Yellow Bells" or "Yellow Trumpet," belonging to the family Rubiaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, derived from its leaves and flowers. The plant is known to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. Stenandriopsis grandiflora is traditionally used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
